title: Pleiarina ramiflora

taxonomy: Pleiarina ramiflora is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is native to tropical Asia and is known for its unique and showy flowers. Within the Apocynaceae family, Pleiarina ramiflora is placed in the subfamily Rauvolfioideae. Further classification places the genus Pleiarina within the tribe Plumerieae. The exact classification of Pleiarina ramiflora is subject to ongoing research and potential updates in botanical classification.
